changes.v1: Initially, calls are forwarded to Clara if Ben does not answer or declines his main business line. Once Ben has a second number for transfers, Clara will be the first point of contact and transfer to that number if a live conversation is required.
changes.v2: Initially, calls will forward to Clara if Ben does not answer or declines. Once Ben's second number is active, Clara will be the primary answerer during business hours and transfer calls requiring Ben to that second number. Ben is currently the sole person taking new client, small job, and service calls.

changes.v1: Emergency calls from GNM Pressure Washing (for Chevron and SOs gas stations) are patched through to Ben. All other after-hours calls will be informed that the business is closed and that someone will get back to them on the next business day.
changes.v2: For all non-emergency calls, a message indicating a return call on the next business day will be played.

changes.v1: Clara will answer incoming calls, particularly from new clients, for small jobs and service calls. Clara will provide information on service call fees when asked: $115 call out fee, $98/hour for residential work, billed in half-hour increments after the first half-hour. Clara will transfer calls to Ben's designated transfer number if a customer needs to speak to him directly (e.g., for complex inquiries, or if they explicitly ask to speak to someone). Initial setup: calls to Ben's main business line are forwarded to Clara if not answered or declined by Ben. This will change once Ben's transfer number is set up, at which point Clara will be the primary answerer.
changes.v2: Clara will answer incoming calls and provide information based on the company website. Clara can transfer calls to Ben's second number if a direct conversation is requested.

changes.v1: Email for post-call notifications: info@bendselectricsolutionsteam.com. SMS for post-call notifications will be sent to Ben's main business line. Contract term is 3 months, then 12 months at the same price. Pavan is the dedicated point of contact for Ben. A follow-up meeting is scheduled for Friday at 2:00 PM to review test calls and dashboard functionality. Ben is currently using his personal number as his main business line and needs a 'second number' for Clara to transfer calls to him.
changes.v2: Ben signed a 12-month contract; pricing will remain fixed after the initial 3 months. Pavan is the dedicated point of contact for Ben. Email notifications for new calls will be sent to info@Ben's Electric Solutions team.com. SMS notifications for new calls will be sent to Ben's main business line (current personal number). Service call fee is $115 for a call out. Hourly charge for residential is $98/hour, billed in half-hour increments ($49/half hour). Clara should only mention the service call fee if specifically asked by the caller. A follow-up meeting is scheduled for Friday at 2:00 PM (local time) to review test calls and the dashboard. Clara will be trained using information from the company's website. The goal for Clara is to minimize spam and sales calls.
